title.en: PROTECTION AGAINST X-RADIATION, GAMMA RADIATION, CORPUSCULAR RADIATION OR PARTICLE BOMBARDMENT; TREATING RADIOACTIVELY CONTAMINATED MATERIAL; DECONTAMINATION ARRANGEMENTS THEREFOR (radiation protection by pharmaceutical means A61K8/00, A61Q17/04; in cosmonautic vehicles B64G1/54; combined with a reactor G21C11/00; combined with X-ray tubes H01J35/16; combined with X-ray apparatus H05G1/02)
Shielding characterised by the composition of the materials
Selection of uniform shielding materials
Laminated shielding materials
Shielding characterised by its physical form, e.g. granules, or shape of the material
Clothing
Bricks; Shields made up therefrom
Transportable or portable shielded containers
Containers for fluid radioactive wastes

for storing radioactive sources, e.g. source carriers for irradiation units; Radioisotope containers
with provision for restricted exposure of a radiation source within the container
Details of, or accessories to, the containers
Shielded cells or rooms
Shielded passages through walls; Locks; Transferring devices between rooms (between glove-boxes G21F7/047)
Room atmosphere, temperature or pressure control devices
Observation devices permitting vision but shielding the observer {(optical systems per se G02)}
Shielded glove-boxes (glove-boxes in general B25J21/02)
Structural combination with remotely-controlled apparatus, e.g. with manipulators
Treating radioactively contaminated material; Decontamination arrangements therefor
{Decontamination of contaminated objects, apparatus, clothes, food; Preventing contamination thereof}

Treating gases
Treating liquids
Treating solids
